====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
[[File:Flint anime.png|thumb|250px|Flint in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
In ''[[JN100|Meeting Up with the Monarch!]]'', Flint had a [[World Coronation Series]] battle against {{an|Leon}}, where he used Infernape against [[Leon's Charizard]], only to lose, causing his rank to drop from 7 to 8.

In ''[[JN109|Aim For The Eight!]]'', Flint was revealed to have fallen out of the Master Class.

In ''[[JN117|The Fiery Road to Mastership!]]'', Flint was shown watching Cynthia's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Iris}}.
